title: Revieve | AI & AR Beauty SaaS: Generative AI & Full-Spectrum AI for Brands & Retailers

paragraphs: AI Skin Analysis for Personalized Skincare at Scale

Delivering real-time skin, hair, and facial analysis that powers personalized routines, smarter recommendations, and connected experiences — all on a scalable platform trusted by global beauty brands and retailers.

Inspire beauty exploration with real-time Try-On that feels true-to-life. From lipsticks to foundations, bold hair color changes to curated full-face artistry, Revieve delivers personalized experiences that boost confidence, engagement, and conversion across every channel.

Let shoppers go from visual inspiration to personalized product discovery. Whether matching a photo or browsing curated full-face styles, Revieve’s Shop by Inspiration—powered by Match My Look and Shop the Look—connects every moment of discovery to action.

Turn real-time analysis, preferences, and beauty goals into personalized routines and product recommendations—tailored to your catalog. Revieve empowers brands and retailers to guide shoppers with precision across the digital shelf, increasing discovery, conversion, and loyalty.

Unlock long-term engagement through smart profile management and evolving skin insights. Powered by Beauty Catalyst, Advisor Pro helps users track progress, update goals, and receive ongoing personalized recommendations—fueling loyalty, retention, and meaningful brand relationships over time.

Deliver real-time, one-to-one guidance that feels human—powered by AI trained for beauty and wellness. From product education to personalized routines, Revieve’s Conversational AI assistant engages users in natural dialogue, adapting to their needs, preferences, and goals across every step of their journey.
Global and Flexible Ecosystem

Experience the power of a true partnership. Revieve works as an extension of your team, minimizing the internal resources needed while bringing the best brand experience to life and ensuring your continuous success.
The only enterprise partner who is 100 % focused on providing B2B(C) digital Skin, Beauty, and Health brand-experiences
Backed by unique IP and advisory committee of trusted brands and retailer players

A high level of customization to build an experience that feels proprietary to you. Market’s most extensive approach to customer  success with on-going training, analytics, insights, and best-practices
Enterprise-grade implementation that scales across channels and 3rd party platforms.
We offera variety of languages and territories, and a global product catalog
Revieve is the only independent enterprise partnerin the industry and doesn’t have brand affiliations or clients as investors.
Empowering Skincare Expertise in Taiwan with Paula’s Choice and Revieve

Driving Strategic Brand Positioning Through Personalized Digital Innovation. In this case study, we explore the impactful partnership between Paula’s Choice Taiwan and beauty tech leader Revieve. With Paula’s Choice aiming to elevate its image as a skincare and ingredient expert in the Taiwan market, the brand turned to Revieve’s AI-powered digital solution to support a campaign focused on exfoliation—a key skincare concern among their consumers. The partnership not only delivered strong engagement and conversion results but also reinforced Paula’s Choice’s commitment to science-backed skincare and technological innovation.
Redefining Excellence in Beauty and Skincare with BABOR and Revieve - Unprecedented Success Through Increased Conversions and Enhanced Customer Retention with Cutting-edge Advisor Solutions

This partnership highlights the remarkable synergy between BABOR's brand philosophy and Revieve's cutting-edge Advisor solutions, which have contributed to unprecedented success in beauty & skincare and the promise of future potential.

Elevating Beauty Retail Standards: JCPenney and Revieve Achieve Remarkable Success with Innovative AI Advisors and Next Gen True-To-Life Makeup Artist VTO Solutions Driving Higher Conversions and Engagement

In this case study, we explore the game-changing collaboration between the renowned retailer JCPenney and the advanced AI beauty tech platform Revieve. This partnership exemplifies the powerful alignment of JCPenney's brand values with Revieve’s state-of-the-art Advisor solutions, resulting in outstanding achievements in makeup, haircare and skincare. The integration of Revieve's innovative technologies has significantly enhanced JCPenney’s customer acquisition, data collection, and engagement, establishing new benchmarks in the industry.
Super-Pharm's Digital Transformation with Revieve’s Enterprise Beauty Platform Drives Increased Sales, Enhanced Marketing ROI and Data-Driven Informed Business Decisions

Super-Pharm's successful and seamless integration of a range of Revieve's solutions, including the Skincare Advisor, Makeup Advisor, and Artist Makeup Virtual Try-on, both on their mobile app and in-store experience, has yielded superior results. The deployment has significantly enhanced user engagement, increased marketing ROI, and consumer confidence. Furthermore, Revieve’s platform opened up new avenues for monetization and facilitated the collection of valuable zero-party and first-party consumer data.
Revieve Introduces LiveAR to Power Real-Time Clinical Results Visualization in Digital Skin Analysis

Revieve launches a real-time augmented reality capability that transforms digital skin analysis into an interactive experience, allowing consumers to visualize skin concerns live and helping brands deliver more engaging, personalized skincare journeys.
Faces and Revieve Establish a New Era of Beauty Innovation in the Middle East with AI-Powered Skin Advisor

Faces, a leading beauty retailer in the Middle East and part of the Chalhoub Group, has partnered with Revieve to introduce an AI-powered Skin Advisor across the UAE, Saudi Arabia, and Egypt. The collaboration brings personalized, data-driven skincare recommendations tailored to regional skin concerns, seasonal challenges, and diverse skin tones, reinforcing Faces’ leadership in beauty innovation and omnichannel customer experience.
Revieve Launches AI Beauty Discovery Connect to Help Beauty Brands and Retailers Expand into Generative AI Commerce Channels

The beauty tech pioneer introduces a new capability bridging brand, retail, and Generative AI ecosystems — connecting discovery, personalization, and shoppable experiences across emerging AI platforms
Beauty & Wellness Index 2025
The Beauty & Wellness Index 2025 analyzes millions of anonymized, AI-powered consumer interactions across skincare and makeup, spanning global beauty brands and multi-brand retailers.
Discover the Next Wave of AI-Powered Beauty Innovation

Revieve is raising the bar with seven powerful new innovations - from AI Skin Age diagnostics and real-time LiveAR to GenAI-ready discovery, conversational AI, and retail media - helping beauty brands create more inspiring, personalized, and high-impact experiences across skincare, makeup, and haircare.
AI Beauty Breakfast NYC: Why AI Is Becoming Beauty’s New Growth Infrastructure

At Revieve’s AI Beauty Breakfast NYC, leaders from NielsenIQ and RoC Skincare explored how AI is moving from experimentation to essential infrastructure—powering discovery, personalization, trust, and measurable growth across beauty.
AI is the new beauty counter: How AI-driven discovery and the rise of agentic experiences make owned digital channels more critical than ever

AI has become the first stop for beauty discovery—but it can’t build emotional connection. This article explores why agentic, brand-owned digital experiences are now essential to turn AI recommendations into trust, conversion, and lasting loyalty.
Revieve and RoC Skincare Win Glossy Award for Best Use of Emerging Technology
Revieve and RoC Skincare win a Glossy Award for Best Use of Emerging Technology for Skin Age Diagnostics, an AI-powered personalized skincare innovation.
Revieve and FACES Named Finalists for Technology Innovation of the Year 2025
Revieve and FACES are finalists for Technology Innovation of the Year 2025 at the Beautyworld Middle East Awards.
Revieve Wins Best Beauty Industry Tech Innovation 2025 at the Corporate Excellence Awards
Revieve has been awarded Best Beauty Industry Tech Innovation 2025 by Corporate Vision Magazine, recognizing its AI-powered personalization platform.
Revieve and Paula’s Choice Win 2025 CommerceNexty Award for Outstanding New Ecommerce Experience
Recognized for redefining digital beauty shopping with an AI-powered, insight-driven skincare journey
RoC Skincare X Revieve – AI Skin Insight Finalist | BeautyMatter NEXT Awards 2025
RoC Skincare’s AI Skin Insight with Revieve named a Finalist in the Best Breakthrough Skincare (Tool) category at the 2025 BeautyMatter NEXT Awards.
BYOMA X Revieve – Smart Skin Scan Finalist | BeautyMatter NEXT Awards 2025
BYOMA’s Smart Skin Scan with Revieve named a Finalist in the Best Use of Technology (Brands) category at the 2025 BeautyMatter NEXT Awards.
Revieve – Shop by Inspiration & Match My Look Finalist | BeautyMatter NEXT Awards 2025
Revieve’s Shop by Inspiration & Match My Look named a Finalist in the Best Breakthrough Technology (Omnichannel) category at the 2025 BeautyMatter NEXT Awards.
KIKO Milano X Revieve – Finalist in Digital Retail – TheIndustry.beauty Awards 2025
KIKO Milano and Revieve recognized as a Finalist in the Digital Retail category at TheIndustry.beauty Awards 2025.
Kate Somerville X Revieve – Skin Quiz Finalist – TheIndustry.beauty Awards 2025
Kate Somerville and Revieve’s Skin Quiz named a Finalist in the Experience category at TheIndustry.beauty Awards 2025.
The INKEY List X Revieve – Acne Analyzer Pro Highly Commended – TheIndustry.beauty Awards 2025
The INKEY List and Revieve’s Acne Analyzer Pro recognized as Highly Commended in the Experience category at TheIndustry.beauty Awards 2025.
2025 Global Tech Award for Beauty Technology
Awarded for innovation, impact, and experience in Beauty Technology at the Global Tech Awards
Revieve Named 2024 Beauty Innovation of the Year by Independent Innovation Awards
Recognized globally for redefining personalization in the beauty industry with groundbreaking AI-powered consumer experiences.
Industry-Leading Al & Proprietary Technology
